message:
perf(vdbe): W1 - preserve function caches when func_registry unchanged (bd-r22b9)

When using reset_for_reuse_preserving_runtime_setup, skip clearing
scalar_function_cache and aggregate_function_cache. Instead, clear them
conditionally in apply_reusable_table_execution_state only when the
func_registry Arc pointer changes.

This avoids unnecessary cache rebuilds on every prepared-statement
execution when the function registry is stable (common case).

Changes:
- Added function_cache_cleared flag to ReusableTableExecutionStateOutcome
  for observability
- Modified reset_for_reuse_impl to skip cache clearing when
  preserve_runtime_setup=true
- Modified apply_reusable_table_execution_state to clear caches when
  func_registry changes
- Added test_w1_function_cache_preserved_when_func_registry_unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
